chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 740 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution 08.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Abbas, advocate for the applicant On 11.02.2025, following order was passed: “11.02.2025 None present As a last and final chance one week’s time allowed for compliance, failing which this Reference Application shall be dismissed for non-prosecution without any further order”. Today once again learned counsel seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge Amjad
